positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_sports.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_sports.tptp
3. held_in(lso,tokyo) [input(axiom)]
4. won_most_medals(us,tokyo) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((held_in(X0,X2) & won_most_medals(X1,X2)) => won_most_medals(X1,X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. won_most_medals(us,lso) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~won_most_medals(us,lso) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~won_most_medals(us,lso) [flattening 7]
11. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals(X1,X0) | (~held_in(X0,X2) | ~won_most_medals(X1,X2))) [ennf transformation 5]
12. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals(X1,X0) | ~held_in(X0,X2) | ~won_most_medals(X1,X2)) [flattening 11]
13. held_in(lso,tokyo) [cnf transformation 3]
14. won_most_medals(us,tokyo) [cnf transformation 4]
15. ~won_most_medals(X1,X2) | ~held_in(X0,X2) | won_most_medals(X1,X0) [cnf transformation 12]
16. ~won_most_medals(us,lso) [cnf transformation 8]
17. ~held_in(X0,tokyo) | won_most_medals(us,X0) [resolution 15,14]
18. won_most_medals(us,lso) [resolution 17,13]
19. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,16]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_sports.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
